# zencodec public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: zencodec.txt 1491 lines (supported surface) | zencodec.features.txt 3 added (features: std) | zencodec.internal.txt 89 lines (89 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

#
#   pub modules                                 9
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)       169
#   pub consts/statics                        172

pub encode::Fidelity::Lossy(encode::LossyTarget)

pub encode::LossyTarget::CodecSpecificQuality(f32)

pub const fn encode::EncodeCapabilities::threads_supported_range(&self) -> (u16, u16)

pub fn gainmap::GainMapInfo::with_bit_depth(self, u8) -> Self
pub gainmap::GainMapParams::alternate_hdr_headroom: f64
pub gainmap::GainMapParams::backward_direction: bool
pub gainmap::GainMapParams::base_hdr_headroom: f64
pub gainmap::GainMapParams::channels: [gainmap::GainMapChannel; 3]
pub gainmap::GainMapParams::use_base_color_space: bool
pub fn gainmap::GainMapParams::direction(&self) -> gainmap::GainMapDirection
pub fn gainmap::GainMapParams::is_single_channel(&self) -> bool
pub fn gainmap::GainMapParams::linear_alternate_headroom(&self) -> f64
pub fn gainmap::GainMapParams::linear_base_headroom(&self) -> f64
pub fn gainmap::GainMapParams::validate(&self) -> core::result::Result<(), gainmap::GainMapParseError>
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct gainmap::GainMapSource
pub gainmap::GainMapSource::data: alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub gainmap::GainMapSource::depth: u8
pub gainmap::GainMapSource::format: ImageFormat
pub gainmap::GainMapSource::metadata: gainmap::GainMapInfo
pub fn gainmap::GainMapSource::new(alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, ImageFormat, gainmap::GainMapInfo) -> Self
pub fn gainmap::GainMapSource::with_depth(self, u8) -> Self
pub struct gainmap::UFraction
pub gainmap::UFraction::denominator: u32
pub gainmap::UFraction::numerator: u32
pub fn gainmap::UFraction::from_f64(f64, u32) -> Self
pub fn gainmap::UFraction::from_f64_cf(f64) -> Self
pub fn gainmap::UFraction::is_valid(&self) -> bool
pub fn gainmap::UFraction::to_f64(self) -> f64

pub fn gainmap::parse_iso21496_fmt(&[u8], gainmap::Iso21496Format) -> core::result::Result<gainmap::GainMapParams, gainmap::GainMapParseError>
pub fn gainmap::serialize_iso21496(&gainmap::GainMapParams) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u8>

pub fn gainmap::serialize_iso21496_fmt_into(&gainmap::GainMapParams, gainmap::Iso21496Format, &mut alloc::vec::Vec<u8>)
pub mod helpers
pub enum helpers::IccMatchTolerance
pub helpers::IccMatchTolerance::Approximate = 13
pub helpers::IccMatchTolerance::Exact = 1
pub helpers::IccMatchTolerance::Intent = 56
pub helpers::IccMatchTolerance::Precise = 3
pub fn helpers::copy_decode_to_sink<'a, J>(J, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &mut dyn decode::DecodeRowSink, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor], fn(decode::SinkError) -> <J as decode::DecodeJob>::Error) -> core::result::Result<decode::OutputInfo, <J as decode::DecodeJob>::Error> where J: decode::DecodeJob<'a>
pub fn helpers::copy_frame_to_sink<D: decode::AnimationFrameDecoder>(&mut D, core::option::Option<&dyn enough::Stop>, &mut dyn decode::DecodeRowSink) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<decode::OutputInfo>, <D as decode::AnimationFrameDecoder>::Error>
pub fn helpers::descriptor_for_decoded_pixels(zenpixels::descriptor::PixelFormat, &SourceColor, core::option::Option<&zenpixels::cicp::Cicp>, helpers::IccMatchTolerance) -> zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor
pub fn helpers::descriptor_for_decoded_pixels_v2(zenpixels::descriptor::PixelFormat, &SourceColor, core::option::Option<&zenpixels::color::ColorProfileSource<'_>>) -> zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor
pub fn helpers::icc_profile_is_srgb(&[u8]) -> bool

pub fn helpers::set_exif_orientation(&[u8], zenpixels::orientation::Orientation) -> core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>

#[non_exhaustive] pub enum AllocPreference
pub AllocPreference::CodecDefault
pub AllocPreference::Fallible
pub AllocPreference::Infallible
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum CicpEmission
pub CicpEmission::Never
pub CicpEmission::WhereValidCarrier
pub CicpEmission::WhereverSupported
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum CodecSetError
pub CodecSetError::Codec(encode::BoxedError)
pub CodecSetError::NoDecoder(ImageFormat)
pub CodecSetError::NoEncoder(ImageFormat)
pub CodecSetError::UnrecognizedFormat
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum ColorEmitPolicy
pub ColorEmitPolicy::Balanced
pub ColorEmitPolicy::Compact
pub ColorEmitPolicy::Compatibility
pub ColorEmitPolicy::Custom(ColorEmitFields)
pub ColorEmitPolicy::Verbatim
pub const fn ColorEmitPolicy::fields(&self) -> ColorEmitFields
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum ErrorCategory
pub ErrorCategory::Image(ImageError)
pub ErrorCategory::Internal(InternalKind)
pub ErrorCategory::Io(CodecIoKind)
pub ErrorCategory::Policy(PolicyKind)
pub ErrorCategory::Request(RequestError)
pub ErrorCategory::Resource(ResourceError)
pub ErrorCategory::Stopped(enough::reason::StopReason)
pub enum GainMapDirection [also: gainmap]
pub GainMapDirection::BaseIsHdr
pub GainMapDirection::BaseIsSdr
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum GainMapPresence [also: gainmap]
pub GainMapPresence::Absent
pub GainMapPresence::Available(alloc::boxed::Box<gainmap::GainMapInfo>)
pub GainMapPresence::Unknown
pub fn gainmap::GainMapPresence::info(&self) -> core::option::Option<&gainmap::GainMapInfo>
pub fn gainmap::GainMapPresence::into_info(self) -> core::option::Option<alloc::boxed::Box<gainmap::GainMapInfo>>
pub fn gainmap::GainMapPresence::is_absent(&self) -> bool
pub fn gainmap::GainMapPresence::is_present(&self) -> bool
pub fn gainmap::GainMapPresence::is_unknown(&self) -> bool
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum GainMapRender [also: decode, gainmap]
pub GainMapRender::BaseOnly
pub GainMapRender::Components
pub GainMapRender::ReconstructHdr
pub GainMapRender::ReconstructHdr::target_headroom: core::option::Option<f32>
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum IccDisposition
pub IccDisposition::Drop
pub IccDisposition::KeepSource
pub IccDisposition::SynthesizeFrom(zenpixels::cicp::Cicp)
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum IccRetention
pub IccRetention::Drop
pub IccRetention::DropIfCicpRepresentable
pub IccRetention::DropIfCicpSafeSoleCarrier
pub IccRetention::Keep
pub IccRetention::KeepNonSrgb

pub struct CodecError(_)
pub fn CodecError::category(&self) -> ErrorCategory
pub fn CodecError::codec(&self) -> core::option::Option<&'static str>
pub fn CodecError::detail(&self) -> core::option::Option<&(dyn core::error::Error + 'static)>
pub fn CodecError::from_native<E>(E) -> Self where E: CategorizedError + core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub fn CodecError::from_parts(core::option::Option<&'static str>, ErrorCategory, alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync)>) -> Self
pub fn CodecError::new(core::option::Option<&'static str>, ErrorCategory) -> Self
pub fn CodecError::of<E>(whereat::at::At<E>) -> whereat::at::At<CodecError> where E: CategorizedError + core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub fn CodecError::with_codec(self, core::option::Option<&'static str>) -> Self
pub struct CodecIoKind
pub const fn CodecIoKind::opaque() -> Self
pub struct CodecSet
pub fn CodecSet::animation_decoder<'a>(&'a self, &'a [u8], &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn decode::DynAnimationFrameDecoder>, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::can_decode(&self, ImageFormat) -> bool
pub fn CodecSet::can_encode(&self, ImageFormat) -> bool
pub fn CodecSet::decodable_formats(&self) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = ImageFormat> + '_
pub fn CodecSet::decode<'a>(&'a self, &'a [u8]) -> core::result::Result<decode::DecodeOutput, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::decode_as<'a>(&'a self, ImageFormat, &'a [u8], &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<decode::DecodeOutput, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::decode_job<'a>(&'a self, ImageFormat) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn decode::DynDecodeJob<'a> + 'a)>, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::decode_preferring<'a>(&'a self, &'a [u8], &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<decode::DecodeOutput, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::decoder_for(&self, ImageFormat) -> core::option::Option<&dyn decode::DynDecoderConfig>
pub fn CodecSet::detect(&self, &[u8]) -> core::option::Option<ImageFormat>
pub fn CodecSet::encodable_formats(&self) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = ImageFormat> + '_
pub fn CodecSet::encode(&self, ImageFormat, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> core::result::Result<encode::EncodeOutput, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::encode_job(&self, ImageFormat) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn encode::DynEncodeJob>, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::encode_job_with(&self, ImageFormat, encode::Fidelity) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn encode::DynEncodeJob>, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::encode_with(&self, ImageFormat, encode::Fidelity, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> core::result::Result<encode::EncodeOutput, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::encoder_for(&self, ImageFormat) -> core::option::Option<&dyn encode::DynEncoderConfig>
pub fn CodecSet::estimate_decode(&self, ImageFormat, &estimate::ImageCharacteristics, &estimate::ComputeEnvironment) -> core::result::Result<estimate::ResourceEstimate, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::estimate_decode_of(&self, &[u8], &estimate::ComputeEnvironment) -> core::result::Result<estimate::ResourceEstimate, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::estimate_encode(&self, ImageFormat, &estimate::ImageCharacteristics, &estimate::ComputeEnvironment) -> core::result::Result<estimate::ResourceEstimate, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::estimate_encode_of(&self, ImageFormat, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, &estimate::ComputeEnvironment) -> core::result::Result<estimate::ResourceEstimate, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::new() -> Self
pub fn CodecSet::probe<'a>(&'a self, &'a [u8]) -> core::result::Result<ImageInfo, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::push_decode<'a>(&'a self, &'a [u8], &mut dyn decode::DecodeRowSink, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<decode::OutputInfo, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::streaming_decoder<'a>(&'a self, &'a [u8], &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn decode::DynStreamingDecoder + 'a)>, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::transcode(&self, &[u8], ImageFormat, encode::Fidelity, MetadataPolicy, ColorEmitPolicy) -> core::result::Result<encode::EncodeOutput, CodecSetError>
pub fn CodecSet::with_decode_policy(self, decode::DecodePolicy) -> Self
pub fn CodecSet::with_decoder(self, impl decode::DecoderConfig + 'static) -> Self
pub fn CodecSet::with_encode_policy(self, encode::EncodePolicy) -> Self
pub fn CodecSet::with_encoder<C>(self, C) -> Self where C: encode::EncoderConfig + 'static, <<C as encode::EncoderConfig>::Job as encode::EncodeJob>::Enc: encode::Encoder + core::marker::Send, <<C as encode::EncoderConfig>::Job as encode::EncodeJob>::AnimationFrameEnc: encode::AnimationFrameEncoder
pub fn CodecSet::with_limits(self, ResourceLimits) -> Self
pub fn CodecSet::with_stop(self, almost_enough::stop_token::StopToken) -> Self
